title: Add Cognitive Engine - AI-powered economic analysis - to business
author: pollinations-ai[bot]
pr_body_excerpt:
- Adds [Cognitive Engine - AI-powered economic analysis -](https://www.anansebi.com/) to business
- Perform AI-powered economic analysis using Cognitive Engine - AI-powered economic analysis - (Motor Cognitivo).

Fixes #9989

gist.headline: The hive means business
gist.blurb: A new community app just sprouted in the Greenhouse! Cognitive Engine brings AI-powered economic analysis to the ecosystem.
gist.summary: Added 'Cognitive Engine', a new community-built app for AI-powered economic analysis, to the business category in the Greenhouse showcase.
gist.impact: Users can now discover and explore this new economic analysis tool in the community app directory.
gist.visual_concept: The PR is about an economic analysis app added to the Greenhouse showcase. Visuals should combine business/finance motifs (charts, data) with the organic Greenhouse theme. Polly the bee wearing a tiny business tie, looking at a retro monitor showing a line chart, surrounded by lush greenhouse plants.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly the bee wearing a tiny red business tie, examining a glowing retro computer monitor displaying a green pixelated line chart going up. The monitor sits on a wooden desk inside a lush greenhouse with code-plants sprouting from lime green (#ecf874) flower pots. Soft pastel gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
